expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Ok, I've read everything — and I can see why it's getting hard to keep straight. Here's what you've actually got spread across those files and recordings:"]},{"type":"List","props":{"items":["Your trip notes name Vasilis & Athina Mari, cover the overall itinerary (Arusha → Ngorongoro → Zanzibar / Stone Town), and mention Richard as a contact person.","The cost spreadsheet tracks multiple payments — safari down payment, balance due, flights, Zanzibar stay, and a couple of bracelet/souvenir lines — with a running total.","The Ngorongoro park-fee PDF details the official concession fees, conservation area tariffs, vehicle fees, and a per-ranger-per-day rate — the document you want in your pocket at the gate.","Your voice memo from the crater adds things that aren't written down anywhere: the driver-guide Emmanuel, the two Maasai bracelets bought for Athena Mari (~$20–25 / ~35,000 TZS), and the $5,000 TZS ranger tip Emmanuel mentioned that nobody told you about beforehand.","And the Stone Town photo — a narrow courtyard with carved wooden balconies and whitewashed arches — is pure memory, not data, but it belongs with the trip."]},"children":[]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"info","title":"Here's what I'd suggest"},"children":["I can pull all of this into a proper trip app you can open on your phone — one place with your itinerary, every cost in a single ledger (including the bits from the voice note), the park-fee rules in a reference you can pull up at the gate, and even the photo stored where you can flip through it later. You'll stop having to chase things across files. Want me to put it together?"]}]}
